---
title: Faster Python
description: Speeding up &nbsp;[![](img/logo_python.svg){width="1.5em"}](https://www.python.org/) computations
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{layout="[[5, 5], [5, -5]]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Accelerated arrays with ![](img/logo_jax.png){width="1.6em"}](hpc_jax.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[An intro course to JAX]{.text-muted}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Faster DataFrames with &nbsp;![](img/logo_polars.png){width="1.6em"}](hpc_polars.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[Introduction to Polars]{.text-muted}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[GPU-accelerated &nbsp;![](img/logo_python.svg){width="1.2em"}](hpc_gpu.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[GPUs on Alliance clusters, CuPy, RAPIDS cuDF]{.text-muted}

:::

:::

:::
